title: selaginella caudata var. durvillaei
intro: Selaginella caudata var. durvillaei, also known as the Spiked Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Selaginella caudata var. durvillaei is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed, with some traditional herbalists also using it in capsule or tincture form.
